mockupSuffix: Shot on Canon EOS R5 with 50mm lens, f/4 aperture. Natural studio window light from the left side, subtle shadows on ground. Canopy fabric shows natural slight tension, realistic aluminum frame joints visible. Polyester canopy fabric with visible weave texture, anodized aluminum frame with brushed finish. Slight natural fabric creasing near frame joints. Light grey seamless paper background. Featuring a clean, professional business logo on the canopy peak panel and valance. Commercial product photography style, no harsh reflections.
lifestyleSuffix: Shot on Sony A7III, 35mm lens, f/2.8. Natural daylight, slight overcast for even lighting. Eye-level medium shot, shallow depth of field with soft background bokeh. Candid event atmosphere, slight grass wear under tent legs, grass slightly flattened under tent footprint, realistic vendor setup with minor imperfections. A few leaves on the ground, extension cord or cooler tucked under table where appropriate. Canopy featuring a clean, professional business logo on the peak panel and valance.
negativePrompt: No illustration, no 3D render, no CGI, no oversaturated, no perfect symmetry, no plastic texture, no oversaturated colors.

scenes.scene: Custom 10x10 pop-up canopy with a clean professional logo on the peak and valance at an outdoor spring festival, vendor row setting, solid navy blue fabric and white valance panel, branded tablecloth on display table, other vendor tents in background, bright blue sky, natural sunlight. Wide shot from attendee POV walking toward the booth.

Single 10x10 custom pop-up canopy fully assembled, featuring a sample business name and logo on the peak panel and valance, solid red fabric and white valance, silver aluminum frame with visible leg crossbars, straight-on front view centered, light grey seamless studio background.

Three-quarter view showing depth.
